 L_MEDICARE_LT_DTL_1 - 12 Monthly detail of long term care utilization. January through December. NF - Nursing Facility (source: MDS assessment)
SNF - Skilled Nursing Facility (source: Medicare claims)
LTC - Long Term Care Hospital (source: Medicare Claims)
Null - None of these Medicare LT services, or no Medicare coverage during the month
 L_LTINST_IND_1 - 12 Monthly indicator of Medicaid LTSS and/or Medicare LT services. January through December. 0 = no LTC stay
